name: codex-team-roles
description: A local Codex bundle with reusable team roles for planning, implementation, UX, and QA.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable planning, dev, QA, and UX roles
interface.longDescription: A local plugin bundle that provides specialized Codex roles for tech lead, development, QA, and UX work.
defaultPrompt: Use $tech-lead to split this feature into safe implementation steps.
Use $qa to review this diff and list the highest-risk issues first.
Use $ux-designer to write a text UI spec for this screen.
